# darkanchor / nginz
> nginx infrastructure, without the Plus price tag. Native modules, scripted policy, and AI gateway control — all running on stock nginx.

## Products
- [/products/nginz](/products/nginz) — Native modules for stock nginx. Apache-2.0. 26 modules covering auth, traffic control, observability, and edge processing — no fork, no patch, no Plus license.
- [/products/nginz-njs](/products/nginz-njs) — Scripted policy layer for nginx njs. Apache-2.0. 13 modules for authorization, feature flags, workflow orchestration, and response transforms — testable, reusable, no second runtime.
- [/products/nginz-token](/products/nginz-token) — AI gateway inside your nginx. BSL-1.1. Token-level rate limiting, per-user cost tracking, semantic caching, and prompt security — no SaaS proxy.

## Documentation

- [/docs/reference/scripted-modules/workflow](/docs/reference/scripted-modules/workflow) — Workflow

## API Endpoints
- `POST /api/contact` — Contact form for **human users**. Accepts form-encoded or JSON. Requires name + message + reply channel. Returns HTML confirmation.
- `POST /api/agent` — Contact endpoint for **AI agents and bots**. JSON-only. Accepts intent + message + reply channel. Returns JSON (202). This is the canonical endpoint for automated systems.
- `GET /api/health` — Health check (returns JSON)

- [/products](/products) — Product overview
